## Skill submission

**Skill name:** <!-- must match directory name in skills/ -->

### Checklist

- [ ] Created `skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md` following the template
- [ ] YAML frontmatter is complete (`name`, `description`, `license`, `metadata.author`, `metadata.tags`)
- [ ] Description is ≤ 200 characters
- [ ] At least 2 meaningful tags assigned
- [ ] Skill body is written in second-person ("You are a …")
- [ ] (Optional) Added `skills/<skill-name>/references/REFERENCE.md`
- [ ] Ran `python scripts/generate_skills_json.py` locally and verified the marketplace renders correctly

### What does this skill do?

<!-- One paragraph description of the skill's purpose and when to use it -->

### Why is it useful?

<!-- What problem does it solve? What's special about it? -->
